description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a low, angular profile with a predominantly olive green exterior accented by dark gray and blue highlights. The front is sharply contoured, resembling a wedge or prow, with two blue slits suggesting reinforced vision ports or sensor arrays. The sides are heavily armored with layered, sloped panels, providing both protection and deflection against projectiles. A prominent, elongated barrel extends from the front, indicating a primary weapon system, while the rear is compact and shielded. The vehicle's design suggests a focus on stealth and survivability, with minimal exposed components and a streamlined silhouette.
description: A low-profile, angular combat tactical vehicle with olive green armor, blue vision ports, and a prominent front-mounted weapon barrel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wedge-shaped prow, blue vision ports, and the central weapon barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sloped armor panels, elongated barrel, and compact rear section.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the shielded back and the tapering of the vehicle's body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same armor layering and weapon barrel.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible weapon mount: a central, forward-facing barrel integrated into the front hull.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor panels on the front and sides; no visible modular or reactive elements.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green with dark gray and blue accents; no distinct camouflage pattern.
